meaning: adj.占优势的,主要的,流行的
examples: The direction of the prevailing winds should be taken into account.
I hope this book is not yet another restatement of the prevailing wisdom.
In this regard, the prevailing star for Aquarius is Uranus.
The grounds for the prevailing opposition to gold convertibility are nicely summed up by Prof.
When employers are calculating the prevailing wage for these workers, they suddenly become low skilled workers.
